goal: Add provider-filtered RF Wiki RAG context for chat-reply and rca-summary while keeping internal Gauss Wiki blocked until its contract is supplied.

steps.name: rag-contract-and-local-public-wiki
steps.summary: Added RAG contract docs and public-safe local RF Wiki seed documents.

steps.name: server-rag-retriever-and-llm-integration
steps.summary: Added server-owned RAG retrieval, provider/security filtering, Gauss internal wiki blocked stub, and LLM adapter context injection for chat-reply and rca-summary. RAG smoke and TypeScript verification passed.

steps.name: verification-and-record
steps.summary: RAG smoke, LLM prompt smoke, TypeScript check, Vite build, server bundle, Harness policy, diff check, and HTTP check passed. Browser click-through remains connector-blocked.
